text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I became Sasami Anshinzawa's
acupuncture test dummy, I've grown accustomed
to playing along with her whims. On one such
day...
Come... Come hither...
choice_data_list: ...Am I being called by the Three Goddesses?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt! Wrong deity! This is Sasami Anshinzawa, divine acupuncturist, at your service! ☆
choice_data_list: Um... So what'd you call me here for?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, you've been in a slump and haven't made
much progress lately, right?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
So I thought I'd give you a nice little poke using
some extra extraordinary needles! ♪
choice_data_list:
What do you mean, "extra" extraordinary?! I
think I'll pass!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, <username>! Don't be
a spoilsport! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'll open up a world of new possibilities, just for
you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Annnd POKE! (Poke... poke... poke...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment the needle pricks me, a flood of
unfamiliar faces and voices infiltrates my mind!

text_block_list.name: Founder of Acupuncture
text_block_list.text:
Behold, acupuncture! The power that will save all
of Umamusume-kind!

text_block_list.name: Unnamed Acupuncturist A
text_block_list.text:
One day, I hope to give all Umamusume a life
free from worries!

text_block_list.name: Unnamed Acupuncturist B
text_block_list.text:
What incredible running! I wish to give them the
poke they need to achieve their dreams!

text_block_list.name: Unnamed Acupuncturist C
text_block_list.text:
To pave the way for their futures with
acupuncture... That is our one and only wish...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel the weight of many wishes and desires being
entrusted to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A fire burns within my chest... and an
uncontainable power bursts from me!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: What the?! Where are you going?!

text_block_list.name: Partner Running Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Is that <chrname>'s trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Partner Running Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Holy smokes, what insane speed! I can't keep up!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Fascinating! To think he can match Umamusume
in speed! This is beyond my wildest dreams!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Fascinating! To think she can match Umamusume
in speed! This is beyond my wildest dreams!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Could Trainer also secretly be an Umamusu—no,
surely not...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hooray! ♪ Did all of you see the results of my
acupuncture skills?! Wow! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, I go partner running with
<chrname> to my heart's content!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Sasami Anshinzawa was true to her word
and really did open up a world of new
possibilities for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day following that wondrous, one-off
moment...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
That poke really did the trick, didn't it? I could
barely tell you apart from an actual Umamusume
from the way you ran!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, what's wrong? You look like you've seen
much better days.
choice_data_list: M-my whole body... is so sore...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear! I guess the greater the results, the
greater the side effects...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
But don't you worry! As long as you keep up your
training, I'm sure you'll eventually be able to
handle the speed boost without repercussions!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although her words raise alarm bells in every fiber
of my being...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the event that we really do achieve that
possibility someday, I would love to run alongside
<chrname> once more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the event that we really do achieve that
possibility someday, I would love to run alongside
<chrname> once more.
